questions.text: 1.1 Is your network segmented using firewalls or VLANs?
1.2 Do you perform regular vulnerability scans of your network perimeter?
1.4 Describe your patch management process for network devices.
1.5 Are all remote access connections made via VPN with MFA?
3.1 Are your data centers protected by physical access controls (badge, biometric)?
3.2 Is CCTV surveillance in place for all server room areas?
3.3 Provide details of your visitor management policy for data center access.
Does your organization classify data by sensitivity level?
Is personal data (PII) stored in encrypted form?
Describe your data retention and deletion policy.
Do you have a data loss prevention (DLP) solution in place?
Are data transfers to third parties governed by data processing agreements (DPAs)?
